snippet: Pate had weepy eyes, and he snored. He liked to talk about the [LINK] he had known during the war.(wiki:Pate_(Standfast).cite_ref-Rtss.7B.7B.7B2....
...ds, Pate went off to fight for [House Osgrey](wiki:House_Osgrey) during the [LINK] . He was one of the only three surviving men that returned with Ser Eustace...
... of the only three surviving men that returned with Ser Eustace, along with [LINK] and [Lem](wiki:Lem_(Standfast)).(wiki:Pate_(Standfast).cite_ref-Rtss.7B.7B....
